name: e2e: the Azure boundary validates and normalizes the Advisor response with bicep IaC
command:
cat > profile.json <<'JEOF'
{"schema_version":"1.0","complete":true,"unanswered":[],"answers":{"workload":"an online appointment booking app for a medical clinic","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"hipaa","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"external-partner","data_cadence":"real-time"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" --vision "medical booking app" --profile profile.json --out-dir sess --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/platform-boundary.sh" --options sess/architecture-options.json --select opt-balanced --platform azure --out h.json 2>/dev/null
printf '{"review_ref":"native-review/az","recommendations":[{"recommendationId":"a1","category":"Security","impact":"High","shortDescription":{"solution":"Enable encryption"}}]}' > n.json
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/azure-boundary.sh" --handoff h.json --native-response n.json --out b.json 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const b=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("b.json","utf8"));process.exit(b.platform==="azure"&&b.validated===true&&b.iac_targets.includes("bicep")?0:1)' && echo azure-normalized 1>&2
